'''ân-sh-sh-ng''' ('''kanashshengoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ultradiscretize|ultradiscretize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-sh-sh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ultradiscretize|ultradiscretize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-sh-sh-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kanashshengoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinashengoko|thinashengoko]] || [[word:jinashengoko|jinashengoko]] || [[word:shinashengoko|shinashengoko]] || [[word:kinashengoko|kinashengoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠnashengoko|thĂŠnashengoko]] || [[word:jĂŠnashengoko|jĂŠnashengoko]] || [[word:shĂŠnashengoko|shĂŠnashengoko]] || [[word:kĂŠnashengoko|kĂŠnashengoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
